message:
test(connectors): align tests with InvalidInput error variant migration

Update test assertions across 18 connector files to match the
InvalidInput error variant introduced in 67c0c658 and 4ebd246c.

- error.rs tests: change FcpError::Internal assertions to
  FcpError::InvalidRequest{code:1005} for InvalidInput mapping
  (algolia, mixpanel, pandadoc, posthog, salesforce)
- connector.rs tests: change Api{status_code:400} assertions to
  InvalidInput(msg) for require_str return values
  (gitlab, grafana, hubspot, intercom, mailchimp, make, pandadoc,
  posthog, pulumi, reddit, salesforce, todoist, annas-archive)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
